name: The Platinum Suites 2
description: Serviced apartment stay in central Kuala Lumpur near KLCC and Bukit Nanas station
notes: Use Grab for most journeys; good base for KLCC and Bukit Bintang.

name: Pavilion Kuala Lumpur
description: Major upscale shopping mall in Bukit Bintang
notes: Good starting point for Bukit Bintang and the Teddy Bear Café.

name: 13DE MARZO Teddy Bear Café
description: Cute viral café inside Pavilion serving drinks with mini teddy bears
notes: Located at Level 3 of Pavilion; good morning stop before the area gets busier.

name: Bukit Bintang
description: Busy shopping and entertainment district with malls cafés and nightlife
notes: Best explored on foot after Pavilion.

name: Thean Hou Temple
description: Large hilltop Chinese temple with city views and ornate architecture
notes: Best reached by Grab; allow time for photos and steps.

name: Sri Mahamariamman Temple
description: Historic Hindu temple at the edge of Chinatown
notes: Quick cultural stop before Petaling Street.

name: Petaling Street
description: Famous Chinatown market street for food souvenirs and street atmosphere
notes: Good for a short walk rather than long shopping.

name: Chinatown Kuala Lumpur
description: Historic district known for markets temples street food and heritage lanes
notes: Best paired with Petaling Street Central Market and Kwai Chai Hong.

name: Central Market Kuala Lumpur
description: Heritage market building with crafts snacks and air-conditioned break spots
notes: Useful stop for coffee and cooling down.

name: Jamboo Concept Store
description: Stylish healthy café and concept spot near Chinatown
notes: Good for a short drinks or brunch stop.

name: Kwai Chai Hong
description: Restored heritage lane with murals cafés and photo spots
notes: Works well as a short late-afternoon stop.

name: Petronas Twin Towers
description: Iconic twin skyscrapers with observation deck and skybridge
notes: Book observation deck tickets online in advance.

name: Suria KLCC
description: Large mall directly below the Petronas Towers with cafés and shops
notes: Useful for coffee break before or after the towers.

name: KLCC Park
description: Central landscaped park with skyline views beside the Petronas Towers
notes: Best around late afternoon or evening.

name: Batu Caves
description: Major limestone cave complex and Hindu pilgrimage site north of the city
notes: Go earlier if possible to avoid stronger heat and crowds.

name: Subang Parade
description: Classic suburban shopping mall in Subang Jaya
notes: Main reason to come here is Chan Rak BBQ and a relaxed mall stop.

name: Chan Rak BBQ
description: Thai-style BBQ and hotpot restaurant in Subang Parade
notes: Located on the ground floor of Subang Parade; good lunch stop.

name: Next Door Dessert
notes: Good for a quick sweet treat after Chan Rak BBQ.
